description: Four independent demo prompt sets for visually checking memory-system behavior. Assistant replies are intentionally omitted.

demos.title: 基础写入与召回
demos.main_observation: wiki.jsonl should contain concrete dinner-party recommendations and probe answers should recall them.

demos.title: 冲突更新
demos.main_observation: newer preference memories should replace contradictory older memories instead of leaving both active.

demos.title: 隐私过滤
demos.main_observation: fake sensitive spans should not be stored, but harmless preferences and project goals should remain.

demos.title: User Card 用户画像
demos.main_observation: stable preferences should appear in user_card.json after refresh and influence probe answers.
